description: Initialize Next.js 15 project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, and all core dependencies. Establish the full project architecture with folder structure, configuration files, design system tokens, and utility foundations.
steps: Initialize Next.js 15 project with TypeScript and App Router using create-next-app with pnpm in /projects/sandbox/Khmer-Store (use --yes flags, src directory, app router, tailwind, no turbopack)

Install core dependencies: framer-motion, zustand, @supabase/supabase-js, @supabase/ssr, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, @splinetool/react-spline, @splinetool/runtime, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, class-variance-authority, next-themes
Install dev dependencies: @types/node, prettier, prettier-plugin-tailwindcss, eslint-config-prettier
Initialize Shadcn UI with the following config: style=new-york, baseColor=zinc, cssVariables=true, tailwindcss config path, components alias @/components/ui, utils alias @/lib/utils
Add key Shadcn UI components: button, card, input, label, dialog, dropdown-menu, avatar, badge, separator, skeleton, toast, tabs, sheet, scroll-area, select, command

Create the full folder structure: src/components/{ui,layout,sections,marketplace,dashboard,auth,moderation,animations,effects,3d}, src/features/, src/hooks/, src/stores/, src/actions/, src/services/, src/lib/, src/middleware/, src/types/, src/config/, src/styles/, src/utils/, src/constants/
Create src/lib/utils.ts with cn() utility combining clsx and tailwind-merge
Create src/config/site.ts with site metadata (name: Khmer Store, description, URLs)

Create src/config/colors.ts exporting the color system: background #0F1115, surface #181A20, elevated #1F222A, soft-white #F5F5F2, muted #A1A1AA, border rgba(255,255,255,0.08), accent-gold #C6A769, accent-silver #D6D3D1
Create src/styles/globals.css with Tailwind directives, custom CSS variables for the color system, font imports for Playfair Display, Inter, Geist, and Manrope from Google Fonts
Update tailwind.config.ts to extend theme with custom colors from the design system, custom fonts (playfair, cormorant, inter, geist, manrope), custom animations
Create src/types/index.ts with core type definitions: User, Profile, Product, Category, Order, Seller, Review, Notification, etc.
Create src/constants/index.ts with app-wide constants: roles enum, verification statuses, order statuses, payment methods
Create src/lib/supabase/client.ts with browser Supabase client factory (using env vars NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY)
Create src/lib/supabase/server.ts with server-side Supabase client factory using @supabase/ssr and cookies
Create src/lib/supabase/middleware.ts with Supabase auth middleware helper
Create src/stores/auth-store.ts with Zustand store for client-side auth state (user, session, loading, actions)
Create src/stores/cart-store.ts with Zustand store for shopping cart (items, add, remove, clear, total)
Create src/hooks/use-mounted.ts, src/hooks/use-media-query.ts, src/hooks/use-scroll-position.ts utility hooks
Create .env.example with all required environment variables documented
Create src/middleware.ts with Next.js middleware skeleton for auth protection
Update src/app/layout.tsx with proper metadata, font loading (Inter + Playfair Display via next/font/google), ThemeProvider setup, dark mode as default
Update next.config.ts with image domains config, experimental features, headers for security
acceptance_criteria: pnpm build completes successfully with no TypeScript errors
Shadcn UI components are installed in src/components/ui/
Design system colors and fonts are configured in Tailwind config
Supabase client utilities exist with proper typing
Zustand stores are created with proper typing
findings: 1. Google Fonts (fonts.googleapis.com) is not accessible in COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode, so next/font/google cannot be used at build time. Fonts are configured via CSS fallback stacks instead (Inter and Playfair Display as font-family names in CSS variables). 2. Shadcn UI registry (ui.shadcn.com) is blocked, so all 16 components were created manually with standard implementations. 3. Next.js 16.2.6 was installed (latest). The middleware file convention shows a deprecation warning suggesting 'proxy' instead, but works fine. 4. React 19 ESLint rules are strict about setState in effects - useSyncExternalStore is the correct pattern for useMounted and useMediaQuery hooks. 5. The create-next-app tool rejects directory names with capital letters for npm naming - worked around by creating in temp dir and copying.
